title: OASIS 3.0.14
release_notes: Restored the Body template metadata contract so B1 contains the request body description and C1 contains the mandatory flag.
Added compatibility for legacy Body templates where B1 contains M or O and C1 contains the description.
Fixed OAS template import so request body descriptions and required flags are preserved correctly.
Prompted for missing release and filename pattern metadata during OAS-to-template import and persisted the values into $index.xlsx.
Refreshed Validation file discovery from the selected OAS folder so newly generated OAS files are immediately selectable.
